injuries.comment: Burakovsky won't play against Colorado on Sunday (Nov. 23), and there is no definitive timeline for his return to the lineup, according to Scott Powers of The Athletic.
The Avalanche said on Wednesday (Nov. 12) that Nichushkin will be week-to-week, per Evan Rawal of the Denver Gazette.
Brindley was announced as week-to-week Saturday (Nov. 22) and will be evaluated in a few weeks, Evan Rawal of the Denver Gazette reports.
